prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CSTBS-100PC-PZ-AMZ Product Type: FASTENER_DRIVE_BIT Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 100pc CRV Security Tamperproof Steel Screwdriver Bit Set Socket Adapter Wing Nut Description: Fix vehicles, computers and other electronics with the 100pc Security Screwdriver Bit Set.

The 100pc Security Screwdriver Bit set comes with everything you'll need to open just about any tamperproof fasteners: a wing nut driver, socket adapters, bit adapters, Phillips, pozidriv, square, slotted, spanner, torq, torx, security torx, tri-wing, one-way, spline drive and hex bits in assorted sizes.

They are constructed of CRV steel and are great for automotive, home and electronic component fixes.

Make sure to keep this set around the house, car, garage or workshop.

Please see "Package Includes" for bit sizes. Search Terms: screwdriver auto repair electronics computer bits Features: - 100pc Tamperproof Security Bit Set - Assorted Bit Sizes & Styles - Material: CRV Steel - Great for Automotive, Computer, Electronics, Repair & More === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 100pc Security Tamperproof Screwdriver Bit Set
